title: Finite Connectedness And Separation Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite connectedness bad connected-claim Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Finite connectedness row where the fixed discrete topology has a non-trivial clopen subset {a}, but the false connectedness claim denies any non-trivial clopen subset.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional topology rows only when the Boolean encoding adds distinct finite set/topology pressure; keep arbitrary connectedness, interval connectedness, and path-connectedness theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite connectedness as deterministic clopen-subset and open-separation checks.
Replay finite connected and disconnected witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation over finite topological spaces.
Emit checked finite enumeration evidence for rejected connectedness claims; the bad-connectedness row now has checked Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT evidence.
Keep connected-image, interval-connectedness, path-connectedness, and general connectedness theorems marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
